The caves of Grishbalt lie north of Gabilshathûr, along the east side of Duvuinen. Avar asked you to find and destroy the two siege-weapons the Orcs h…
Avar is at Gabilshathûr, south of Duvuinen. You should return to the Avar with word of your success.
